items.name_en: Name: FENDI Mon Tresor Bucket Bag
items.name_cn:
Name: FENDI Mon Tresor Bucket Bag
Quality: Original Sample
Model: 8802
Color: Mocha
Size: 12*18*10cm
FENDI's latest masterpiece, featuring the standout vintage FF letter embossed print, which is the brand's most classic pattern. The exquisite bucket shape adds to its outstanding appeal, looking beautiful when worn. Based on authentic purchase patterns, original sample level, exquisite workmanship.

items.name_en: Blue Denim Peekaboo X-tote
items.name_cn:
Blue Denim Peekaboo X-tote
Classic Monogram canvas paired with the Peekaboo's classic rotating buckle. The overall look is both high-end and vintage, especially suitable for a mature, chic style. The bag is very lightweight, making it a great choice for daily work and commuting.
1819B98
Size: 41x16x30cm

items.name_en: FEND1 Latest Peekaboo X-Tote
items.name_cn:
FEND1 Latest Peekaboo X-Tote
Peekaboo can be said to be FEND1's soul piece. Dark green canvas material paired with the iconic turn buckle, the shape is atmospheric. It can be sweet or salty, formal or casual!
8004
Size 41x16x30cm

items.name_en: 👄FENDI New Mon Tresor Small Bucket Bag, Beige Canvas material, featuring a raised FF pattern embroidery with color-blocked stitching, matching leather trim. Lined with gold-finish hardware. One long and one short detachable shoulder strap, woven soft Nappa leather, can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody. Model: FD6112, Dimensions: 18*10*12cm

items.name_en: 👄FENDI New Iconic By The Way Mini Boston Bag, brown FF jacquard fabric material, featuring beige leather FENDI ROMA lettering. Hard tortoiseshell-effect organic glass handle. Model: FD8067, Size: 20.5*9*12cm.
